response: The levels of 25-hydroxyvitamin D (25OH-VD) and fatty acids (FF) were measured using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's instructions, and the results were read using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader (Dynatech MR 7000). The level of 25OH-VD in serum was determined using an ELISA kit (catalog number ab213966, Abcam Inc.) via quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (16). The level of tumor necrosis factor-alpha (TNF-α) in serum was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog number ab46087, Abcam Inc.) via the same technique (17). The level of thromboxane analog (TAC) in serum was also measured using an ELISA kit (catalog number ab65329, Abcam Inc.) using the quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (18).
